chrome.signInIntro: Sign in to follow venues and manage notifications.

auth.resetSentBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a link to reset your password. Open it to choose a new one.
auth.resetBody: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.confirmSentBody: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to confirm your account — you'll come straight back here, signed in.

errors.enterEmailPassword: Enter your email and a password.
errors.passwordMin: Use a password of at least 8 characters.
errors.signInFailed: Couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.startSignInFailed: Couldn't start sign-in. Please try again.
errors.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
errors.invalidLogin: That email or password doesn't match.
errors.alreadyRegistered: That email already has an account — try signing in instead.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.fallback: Couldn't complete that. Please check your details and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.signedOutIntro: Sign in to manage your account settings.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteBody: Permanently deletes your profile, posts, plans, chats and follows. This can't be undone.
danger.modalBody: This permanently removes your profile, posts, plans, chats, follows and saved offers. It can't be undone. Comments you left on others' walls stay, but no longer show your name.
danger.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

language.title: Language
language.label: App language
language.hint: More languages are on the way. Posts and community content stay in the language they were written in — your browser can translate those.
